title: Ant-colony override reclaimed abandoned plans
summary: Released all codex-tier2 claims with tools.agent.stale_claims --threshold-hours 0 and shipped an override commit bundling the abandoned plan/bus artifacts so work can continue without waiting for missing owners.
actions: Captured working-tree + stale-claim receipts under _report/usage/override/, auto-released ND-067/072/073/074/075/076 and QUEUE-057, then committed override: reclaim abandoned plans and pushed to main.
signals: Stale claim sweep showed >20h idle QUEUE-057 plus multiple cold ND tasks; workflow improvements demanded a pheromone-first response instead of waiting for plan owners who no longer exist.
